name: Can my employer fire me for filing workers comp in West Jordan Utah?

mainEntity.name: Can my employer fire me for filing workers comp in West Jordan Utah?

acceptedAnswer.description: No, retaliation is illegal; unlawful discharge for claiming benefits violates law.[2][5] Utah prohibits interference including demotion or firing.[2] Key factors: Timing of action post-filing; document patterns; fines for violations.[2] Practical guidance: Keep job search records if terminated, file retaliation complaint with Labor Commission, and seek lawyer. Protections ensure safe filing.
